privileged_info_summary: This is an end-of-quarter CRM pipeline audit task in Odoo 17 CRM with all synthetic data seeded via XML-RPC. The task has two phases. Phase 1: Create infrastructure - pipeline stage 'Negotiation' (between Proposition and Won), lost reason 'Champion Left Organization', and sales team 'Q2 Priority Accounts' (leader: Mitchell Admin). Phase 2: Review 7 opportunities by reading their internal notes and applying decision rules. The correct mappings are: (1) 'DataVault Cloud Migration - Pinnacle Financial' ($180K, Qualified) -> Rule 1: move to Proposition, probability 65% (note mentions budget approved, wants formal proposal). (2) 'Network Infrastructure Refresh - Harbor Shipping Co' ($95K, Proposition) -> Rule 2: mark Lost with reason 'Champion Left Organization', do NOT assign to Q2 team (note says deal champion Sarah Chen left, no response to follow-ups). (3) 'ERP Modernization Suite - Atlas Manufacturing' ($220K, Qualified) -> Rule 3: move to Negotiation, probability 85%, priority High/2 stars (note says verbal agreement from CFO, legal reviewing contract). (4) 'Full Office 365 Migration - Cascade Retail Group' ($45K, Proposition) -> Rule 4: rename to 'Email Migration - Cascade Retail Group', revenue $18,000, probability 75% (note says scope reduced to email-only migration at $18K). (5) 'Cybersecurity Audit Package - NovaTech Solutions' ($65K, Qualified) -> Rule 5: revenue $92,000, create+apply tag 'Competitor: OmniTech', priority High/2 stars, probability 50% (note says scope expanded to $92K, mentions competitor OmniTech). (6) 'Managed IT Services - Greenfield Organics' ($75K, New) -> Rule 6: schedule Call activity for April 15, 2026 with summary 'Q2 follow-up: check on reorg status', keep in New stage (note says company in reorganization, reconnect Q2). (7) 'Custom Analytics Platform - Redwood Data Systems' ($135K, Qualified) -> Rule 7: create contact Elena Foster (VP of Operations, email elena.foster@redwooddatasystems.example.com, phone +1 (503) 555-0147), link to Redwood Data Systems company, set as opportunity customer, probability 60% (note says previous contact retired, Elena took over with details provided). ALL 7 opportunities must be tagged 'Q1-Reviewed'. All non-Lost opportunities (1,3,4,5,6,7) must be assigned to 'Q2 Priority Accounts' sales team.
